name: Availability
description: Information about when a menu is available for use.

alwaysAvailable.description: Indicates whether this menu is available 24 hours per day, 7 days a week. If `alwaysAvailable` is FALSE, then a `schedule` value is included in the `Availability` object to define the specific times and days a menu is available. If `alwaysAvailable` is TRUE, then the `schedule` value is omitted.

schedule.description: An array of `Schedule` objects that indicate the specific days and times a menu is available. If `alwaysAvailable` is TRUE, then the menu is available 24 hours per day, 7 days per week, and this `schedule` value is omitted from the `Availabilty` object.
